summary: UltraMatrix capture of a scorching night featuring Lucy in the Sky and a moving Wharf Rat; recording is decent but not praised, while the performance shines.
review: The reviewer raves about this show as one of the top Shakedown Street performances ever, highlighting an electrifying "Lucy in the Sky with Diamonds" and a deeply moving "Wharf Rat." While they note that other audience tapes capture the sound better and SBD tapes fall short, no specific criticism is given for this UltraMatrix source.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong enthusiasm for the musical performance offsets the lack of concrete recording quality feedback; with only one review, confidence is limited.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No direct comments on this UltraMatrix tape's sound; reviewer mentions other audience tapes capture the night better and SBD tapes don't do it justice.

standout_songs: Lucy in the Sky with Diamonds
show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as an amazing, seamless trip throughout the night.
